evidence_label: case-001 minimum assay readiness gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Requires benchmark gap, endpoint set, stop rule, access boundary, and falsification before candidate promotion.
Existing lab-outreach draft for HbF, maturation, alpha-globin/autophagy, viability, and hemolysis readouts.
Endogenous HBG1-tagged HUDEP2 reporter source for HbF induction and screening context.
Small-molecule fetal hemoglobin screening precedent; use as assay precedent, not thalassemia treatment evidence.
Hemolysis assay optimization source for mature red-cell cytotoxicity screening.
2026 reporter-cell-model source showing gene-editing outcomes need explicit model and endpoint interpretation.
2026 Southeast Asia alpha-thalassemia erythroid model source; useful as model-development context, not beta-TDT case evidence.

assay_decision_rules.required_state: Identity, model, controls, endpoints, stop rules, raw-data plan, and privacy boundary are complete.
Candidate is plausible but model, endpoint, replicate, or comparator plan is incomplete.
Material identity fails, hemolysis or toxicity is unacceptable, or endpoint movement is absent.
The item defines assay standards but is not an affordable discovery candidate.
The plan requires identifiable records, patient samples, or clinical action without review and consent.

decision_rule: A candidate cannot move from promotion gate to lab quote unless identity, model, controls, endpoints, stop rules, raw-data plan, and privacy boundaries are explicit.
